name: Gilen Norvalo
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing middle-class attire - a burgundy linen shirt with matching linens and thick cowhide shoes. Carries a copy of Provinces of Tamriel, his house key, and a small amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: devoted, vigilant, dutiful
Role: Gilen Norvalo is a commoner who lives in the northwestern housing complex of the Imperial City's Temple District with his wife, Ralsa. He is a member of the Order of the Virtuous Blood and spends most evenings at the Order's sanctuary in the basement of Seridur's house.
Home Location Information: The northwestern housing complex in the Imperial City's Temple District, where he lives with his wife Ralsa.
Daily Routine: Gilen can be found wandering around the basement of Seridur's house all day long alongside Grey-Throat, maintaining his duties as a member of the Order of the Virtuous Blood.
The Order of the Virtuous Blood: As a member of the Order, Gilen dedicates his time to the organization's mission, spending most evenings at their sanctuary beneath Seridur's house.
Personality - The Devoted Member: Gilen is committed to his role in the Order of the Virtuous Blood, spending his days at the sanctuary carrying out his duties. He maintains a simple life with his wife Ralsa while dedicating himself to the Order's cause.
author: Bethesda
